_comment: Test user — 2025 Week 15 fantasy PLAYOFF SEMIFINALS game (one win from the championship). User lost 161.7 to 169.82 (was favored at 80% win prob). 10-team PPR league with QB/RB/RB/WR/WR/TE/FLEX/D-ST/K. v1 prototype scores QB+RB+RB+WR+WR+TE+FLEX (7); D/ST and K not tracked. User's stated regret: started C.Loveland over H.Fannin at TE — Loveland's breakout actually started Week 16, so the call was wrong for Week 15; user believes had he benched Loveland for Fannin he would have won the semi and the championship. User does not have historical lineup or full bench records — bench is only partially known (Fannin was the bench TE used in the regret call); other bench slots will remain unfilled.

_pivotal_decision.user_retrospective: wrong call for week 15 — Loveland's breakout started week 16; starting Fannin would have closed the 8.12-pt gap and (per user) led to the championship

league.scoring_notes: Standard PPR; D/ST + K used in actual roster but not v1 prototype.
